title: Patch 26.13 Notes
overview: A balance-focused patch that reins in snowball-heavy marksmen and hands junglers a stronger early game, with a light touch on mid-lane mages.
summary: Marksman item spikes tuned down to slow bot-lane snowballing
Jungle early game buffed via better objective and camp rewards

systems.summary: Epic monster and camp gold up early
systems.details: Jungle camps and early objectives grant more gold, so proactive junglers get rewarded harder for clearing and contesting.
